record.summary: The Rust crate for the single binary named stagecraft: clap-based command tree, layered configuration (flags > env > config file), structured output discipline (human tables on TTY, JSON with --output json), and a CI workflow (fmt, clippy -D warnings, test, release build). No network calls yet; spec 003 adds auth and the API client. After this spec, `cargo install --path .` yields a binary whose skeleton every later verb hangs off.
record.title: The stagecraft binary: crate scaffold, config, CI
